content:
Orlando vacation checklist:
Disney World, Universal, SeaWorld & Port Canaveral

Orlando Travel Destinations | Disney, SeaWorld, Universal Studios, Golf

Orlando, Florida, located in the central region of the Sunshine State, is best known as one of the most touristic cities in the United States thanks to the amazing World Disney World, SeaWorld & Universal Studios theme parks which most definitely must make it to your Orlando travel destinations checklist. Over 41 million visitors come to this city every year generating billions of dollars in the process. Therefore, it is not surprising that Orlando has become a premier tourist center in the United States.

Due to the popularity of this city among tourists, many companies now offer more specialized and diversified vacation packages or Orlando Travel Destination sales pitch focusing on Walt Disney Resorts, Universal Studios, SeaWorld, The Amazing Golf Courses and Port Canaveral cruises in the hope of attracting more potential visitors and income revenue. If you want to maximize and take advantage of this revival of holiday vacation options and discounts packages, here is a teaser about Orlando travel destinations to get you started.

The three main Orlando theme park resorts are:

Walt Disney World Theme Parks

Walt Disney World Theme Parks
  • EPCOT Center
  • Magic Kingdom
  • Animal Kingdom
  • Pandora – The World of Avatar
  • Typhoon Lagoon Water Park
  • Blizzard Beach Water Park
  • Star Wars Launch Bay
  • Disney’s Boardwalk
  • Camp Disney
  • ESPN Wide World of Sports.

Orlando Travel Destinations: SeaWorld

Orlando SeaWorld Adventure Parks
  • Aquatica
  • SeaWorld
  • Discovery Cove

Meanwhile, the SeaWorld Adventure Park is very popular among marine wildlife and conservation. Depending on the range of sea vacation packages World in Orlando, you’ve chosen, you can visit the three main sections of the park, including Key West Harbor happy Shamu, and the port, but also offers popular games such as Sky Tower, the Kraken, Infinity Falls, Mako and Manta (roller coaster flight) for adults and Jazzy jellies, and Fishies swishy Ups net for children.

Universal Studios Florida

Universal Theme Attraction Parks
  • Volcano Bay
  • Islands of Adventure
  • Universal Studios Florida

Universal Studio attractions: With about 50 attractions and things to do in Universal Studios in Orlando besides the City Walk, no wonder why this is a must checklist item in your Orlando Travel Destinations Guide and I thought that rather that pack this page with so many goodies, it’s a better option to provide you with the direct url to the up to date ride list as per Universal’s website and here it goes:
Click here for an updated list of Universal Studios Orlando attractions list.

Finally, Universal Studios is the home park of Hollywood’s most memorable and major attractions. Without doubt, a visit to Orlando warrants a visit to one if not all of these theme parks. Fortunately, most vacation packages now offer combination deals that will include these three amazing (and exhausting) theme parks in your Orlando travel destinations guide. In addition, you can choose to stay in your cottage Favorite Disney, Universal or SeaWorld Resort as part of the many offers available.

Orlando, Florida - A Paradise for Golfers

Due to warm weather and being sunny all year round, Orlando is also known as the top golf courses designed by world-class professors themselves. If you want to spend a golf vacation centered, you can visit the Jack Nicklaus designed Grand Cypress Golf Club – East Course, a private course open to resort guests. 

Amenities include a clubhouse, driving range, practice sheets, concessions, restaurant and golf shop. You can also visit the Arnold Palmer Bay Hill Club and Lodge, which also offers excellent facilities, not only for golf but also for tennis, spa treatments, etc. Even if you booked a Disney vacation home, it is likely that these courses are very close to your home so why not play a game of the swing next to gold?

In addition to the above, you can also visit other famous tourist destinations in Orlando. You can also contact your travel agent, so you can get more recommendations and discounts

Europe Skiing Destinations: Val d’Isère, French Alps

Skiing in Val d’Isère, France has become an extremely popular sporting event. The Val d’Isère is located at 1.821 meters above sea level and is among the most popular skiing destinations of the French Alps. Val d’Isère together with Tignes form part of the large Espace Killy, the world’s most spectacular skiing region.
